title: Replication Data for: "Colliding in the shadows of giants: Planetesimal collisions during the growth and migration of gas giants"
content:
# Replication Data for: "Colliding in the shadows of giants: Planetesimal collisions during the growth and migration of gas giants"

Authors: Carter, Philip J., Stewart, Sarah T.
Published: 2020-08-06T21:41:18Z
Subjects: Astronomy and Astrophysics, Earth and Environmental Sciences
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/5YQDU9

This dataset contains data from the article: Carter, P. J. and Stewart, S. T., 2020, "Colliding in the shadows of giants: Planetesimal collisions during the growth and migration of gas giants", PSJ, 1, 45. These data consist of N-body simulation input files, processed data, select simulation output and code to read input/output files. See the README file for further information.

Citation: Carter, Philip J.; Stewart, Sarah T., 2020, "Replication Data for: "Colliding in the shadows of giants: Planetesimal collisions during the growth and migration of gas giants"", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/5YQDU9, Harvard Dataverse, V1
